title: MATANA 6 White Rectangular Serving Platters with Silver Rim, 30x23cm - Reusable Plastic Trays for Snack, Sandwich, Buffet Trays, Food Serving, Catering, Parties, Weddings, Birthdays
features: ELEGANT AND VERSATILE : Our set of 6 Rectangular White Serving Platters with Silver Border adds a touch of sophistication to any occasion, making them ideal for buffets, weddings, birthdays, Christmas, and parties.
STURDY AND REUSABLE : Crafted from premium quality PP material, these platters are virtually unbreakable and built to last, ensuring you can use them again and again.
HEAT RESISTANT : These trays are designed to withstand heat, making them perfect for serving hot or cold foods with confidence.

WIDE RANGE OF USES : From sandwiches and finger foods to appetizers, snacks, desserts, fruits, cheese, charcuterie, sushi, antipasto, canapés, cupcakes, cookies, brownies, and cakes, these food trays are suitable for a variety of culinary creations.
EASY TO CLEAN: While these plastic food trays are dishwasher safe, hand washing is recommended to maintain their stylish design and preserve the silver border.
description: Add a touch of sophistication to any occasion with our set of 6 Rectangular White Serving Platters with Silver Border. Ideal for buffets, weddings, birthdays, Christmas, and parties, these platters bring a refined elegance to your table. Crafted from premium quality PP material, these plastic trays are virtually unbreakable and built to last. Designed to withstand heat, they are perfect for serving both hot and cold foods with confidence. From sandwiches and finger foods to appetizers, desserts, and more, these versatile platters are suited for a wide range of culinary creations. For easy maintenance, these food trays are dishwasher safe, though we recommend hand washing to preserve the elegant silver border and ensure they remain a stunning addition to your table setting. Choose our serving platters for a blend of durability, elegance, and versatility that enhances every dining experience.
